seoTitle: New Brighton vs New Italy — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between New Brighton and New Italy. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: New Brighton vs New Italy: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in New Brighton and New Italy.
heading: New Brighton vs New Italy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between New Brighton, New South Wales and New Italy, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: New Italy has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to New Brighton (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is New Brighton or New Italy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: New Brighton has a flood risk score of 46/100, while New Italy scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: New Brighton scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. New Italy scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in New Brighton or New Italy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. New Italy has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
